name: Massif
description: A dusk range of overlapping peaks, snowcaps riding the summits — every redraw heaves up a new skyline.

code.style: --rock: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* peak and snowcap share one emitted apex so the cap stays on the summit */ --ax: @r(30, 70); --ph: @r(48, 92); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -8%; width: 116%; bottom: 0; height: calc(@var(--ph) * 1%); background: var(--rock); clip-path: polygon(calc(@var(--ax) * 1%) 0%, 114% 100%, -14% 100%); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -8%; width: 116%; bottom: calc(@var(--ph) * 0.72%); height: calc(@var(--ph) * 0.28%); background: var(--color4); clip-path: polygon(calc(@var(--ax) * 1%) 0%, calc(@var(--ax) * 1% + 16%) 100%, calc(@var(--ax) * 1% - 16%) 100%); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
